↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇸🇴/🇺🇸🇮🇱Somalia may restrict access to the Bab el-Mandeb Strait for countries that undermine the country’s territorial integrity, its ambassador to Ethiopia and permanent representative to the African Union, Abdullahi Warfa, said on X. "Any country interfering…" 🇸🇴 🌟 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Seizure of a cargo vessel off the Somali coast ➡️ The United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) reported early this morning that a maritime hijacking incident has occurred 6 nautical miles northeast of the port of Garacad, Somalia. ➡️ According to the alert, unidentified armed individuals have seized control of a cargo vessel and diverted it toward Somali territorial waters. ➡️ No further details have yet been released regarding the crew, cargo, or nationality of the hijacked vessel, and investigations by the relevant authorities are ongoing. 🐻 Since the Somali federal government hasn't spoken on this, this is clearly an independent action by Puntland — one of Somalia's semi-autonomous federal member states. Unlike Isreali/USA-backed Somaliland , they are not separatists — they formally acknowledge the federal government, but operate in practice as an autonomous region with their own president, police and military. Garacad has been the center of Somali piracy since the early 2000s. To repeat what we wrote 2 weeks ago — Yemenis are just sitting on the shore and watching the world burn. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

↩️ Reply to OSINT OSINTdefender “PS,” Allen said in the manifesto, “Ok now that all the sappy stuff is done, what the hell is the Secret Service doing? … No damn security. Not in transport. Not in the hotel. Not in the event.” He said that if he had been an Iranian agent, he could have brought in a machine gun, which he referred to as “Ma Deuce,” and no one would have noticed. Cole Thomas Allen, 31, the shooter in last night’s attempted terrorist attack on the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington, wrote a “manifesto” that has since been found by federal law enforcement in which he stated his plans to target Trump administration officials, “prioritized from highest-ranking to lowest,” according to a copy obtained by CBS News. In his manifesto, Allen stated that he would not target members of the U.S. Secret Service, Capitol Police or National Guard, along with hotel employees and guests, but that he would still attack them to get to the administration, adding: “I really hope it doesn't come to that.” Allen also said that he would specifically not attack FBI Director Kash Patel, who was also attending the dinner at the Washington Hilton. - OSINTdefender tweet

Open Source Intel UKMTO statement: UKMTO has received a report of an incident 6NM North East of Garacad, Somalia. It has been reported that unauthorised persons have taken control of a cargo vessel which has been re-directed to within territorial waters. Due to the increased threat of possible PAG activity, vessels are advised to transit with caution and report any suspicious activity to UKMTO while authorities investigate. tweet

OSINTdefender Cole Thomas Allen, 31, the shooter in last night’s attempted terrorist attack on the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington, wrote a “manifesto” that has since been found by federal law enforcement in which he stated his plans to target Trump administration officials, “prioritized from highest-ranking to lowest,” according to a copy obtained by CBS News. In his manifesto, Allen stated that he would not target members of the U.S. Secret Service, Capitol Police or National Guard, along with hotel employees and guests, but that he would still attack them to get to the administration, adding: “I really hope it doesn't come to that.” Allen also said that he would specifically not attack FBI Director Kash Patel, who was also attending the dinner at the Washington Hilton. tweet

🔄 Forwarded from НЕРЫБАРЬ: В «интернетах» за сутки уже успели пару раз окончательно сдать Кидаль боевикам и показать видео с эвакуацией раненых с десятка ракурсов. Но задать вопрос — а так ли всё на самом деле? — почему-то ни у кого язык не повернулся. Так вот, на весь городок Кидаль (на минуточку — центр целого региона) есть всего одна значимая достопримечательность: построенный французами Форт-де-Кидаль . Можно ставить что угодно на то, что займи боевики город целиком, они первым же делом побежали бы снимать с него флаг Мали, фиксируя «исторический момент» на камеру. Но таких кадров мы почему-то не наблюдаем. А значит, кто-то до сих пор контролирует не только южные окраины, но и ключевой опорный пункт — бывшую базу ооновской миссии, простреливая центр. И вот тут встает вопрос: кто же, если Африканский Корпус успел уже 100500 раз уехать, согласно экспертам?
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 НЕРЫБАРЬ：在过去的一天里，“互联网”上已经有几次传言基达尔（Kidal）彻底落入武装分子之手，并展示了从十几个角度拍摄的伤员撤离视频。但不知为何，没有人提出这样一个问题——事实真的如此吗？事实上，整个基达尔小镇（顺便提一下，它是一个完整地区的中心）只有一个重要的地标：法国人建造的基达尔堡（Fort-de-Kidal）。可以肯定的是，如果武装分子完全占领了该镇，他们做的第一件事就是摘下马里的国旗，并用摄像机记录下这个“历史性时刻”。但不知为何，我们并没有看到这样的画面。这意味着，有人至今不仅控制着南部郊区，还控制着关键的据点——前联合国特派团基地，并能对中心地带进行火力覆盖。于是问题来了：如果按照专家所说，非洲军团（Africa Corps）已经撤离了100500次，那么现在控制那里的人是谁？

text: OSINTdefender Mali’s government has confirmed the death of their defense chief, General Sadio Camara, during the ongoing offensive by Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) and the Azawad Liberation Front (FLA) against Mali’s armed forces. text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇷 Three supertankers were seen today being loaded with oil at the terminals of Kharg island. This may suggest that Iran still see seaborne oil export as potentially profitable despite the naval blockade. This could also be a way to store oil products as the land storages are full. The ships are less vulnerable to an enemy strike as the risk of oil slick is too high. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇷 今天看到三艘超级油轮在哈尔克岛码头装载石油。尽管美国实施了海军封锁，伊朗仍在继续装船。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇷 今天可以看到两艘超级油轮在哈尔克岛装载石油。这可能表明，尽管面临海军封锁，伊朗仍认为海上石油出口有利可图。这也可能是储存石油产品的一种方式，因为陆地储油设施已满。船只遭受敌方打击的风险较小，因为一旦发生石油泄漏，后果太严重。@wfwitness
